Preview:

But mad? Full on pissed off? Oh, that was less common than seeing him smile. Sure, there were times where he was so irritated that he felt like he was mad, but no. He was able to keep him composure in those situations. When he really was angry, it's usually because of something out of his control, which was close to never. He tried to keep on top of things, keep himself composed. It was easy to do that, really.
